name: Super Moist Banana Black Walnut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease (or spray with PAM) 8 large muffin cups. I used 6 in one set and 2 in another; set aside.
3. Sift together into a bowl the flour, baking powder (or baking soda), and salt. Set aside.
4. In another bowl, cream the butter, sugar, vanilla, and honey. Add the orange zest, eggs, and mashed bananas. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the banana mixture. Fold in the nuts.
5. Divide the batter among the 8 muffin cups; they should be about two-thirds full.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a cake tester (or toothpick) inserted in the center comes out clean. Check at 25 minutes; if browning too much on top but still raw in the middle, cover pans with aluminum foil and bake for 5 more minutes.
7. Turn out onto wire racks to cool completely.
